channel.title: 前端 on 交讓所生

item.title: JavaScript Note
item.description:
Before We Start

before technology

In fact, my purpose to write this post is to practice my English and just review what i have learnt over the past month, I also want to take some notes. Of course, if this is useful for you, i will vary happy.

This is just a note about JavaScript, not a guide.So if you want to learn JS, please look for another post, or wait for me to write one in the future, when I finish my learning about JavaScript.
